releases.author: vslinko
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* #341 Fix Vertical lines didn't aline at the bullet by @Fyzu in https://github.com/vslinko/obsidian-outliner/pull/365
* Update Obsidian-API version 0.16.3 by @Fyzu in https://github.com/vslinko/obsidian-outliner/pull/366
* Fix: Indent lines didn't aline at the bullet with custom tab size by @Fyzu in https://github.com/vslinko/obsidian-outliner/pull/367
* #312: Fixes drawing vertical rulers in non-list text blocks when "Draw vertical lines" option of plugin is enabled by @bukhtiyarov-a-v in https://github.com/vslinko/obsidian-outliner/pull/369
* #304: Fixes the height of lines container when additional panels are … by @bukhtiyarov-a-v in https://github.com/vslinko/obsidian-outliner/pull/370

## New Contributors
* @bukhtiyarov-a-v made their first contribution in https://github.com/vslinko/obsidian-outliner/pull/369

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/vslinko/obsidian-outliner/compare/4.1.0...4.1.1

releases.author: vslinko
releases.description:
Huge release! 🚀

![out](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/205823/119222374-cb48c180-bafc-11eb-9bd4-98e433b28c8f.gif)

## Features

- Soft line break support #38

## Internal enhancements

- Massive refactoring: all operations with Root extracted from features to better testability
- E2E tests converted from typescript to markdown

releases.author: vslinko
releases.description:
Soft line break support beta1

## Manual installation

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` from the latest release and put them into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-outliner` folder.

releases.author: vslinko
releases.description:
Huge release! 🚀 

## Features

- Configurable hotkeys for commands
- Added configuration for features without hotkeys
- More useful and correct README file

## Bugfixes

- Fixed: Moving an item causes nearby lists to unfold #62 
- Fixed: Unable to unload plugin without restarting Obsidian

## Internal enhancements

- Modular source code structure
- End-to-end tests
- Configured Github Actions that run tests in a real Obsidian app
